title: thismia angustimitra
intro: Thismia angustimitra, also known as the "leafless orchid", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Balsamiaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that may help to soothe wounds and prevent infection. The health benefits of Thismia angustimitra include potential uses in treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Thismia angustimitra can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or by using the plant's extracts in tinctures or ointments.
